7/29/2021
-[SCRUM] Ask groups to provide 2-3 item Summary roll-up. Groups work offline to wrap up before Review. Ask Kody to demo Teams in Retrospective.
-QXRH Emmitsburg -> Steven Criss -> D0 SPR

-1:1
phoenix TC WIP - will keep open for Kalpanas Beta plan
improving our debug - npk/beagle - Jason to send off e-mails mark/norby - gather notes for wiki bkm
Jason to ask BMC team about MCTP functionality
Core wake on PECI CCB - Need D0 and PCH upgrades to test - will check out QXRH Emmitsburg for Steven.
[FW: Discuss goal & format of Sprint Review meeting] - TL;DR - Ask groups to provide 2-3 item Summary roll-up. Groups work offline to wrap up before Review. Ask Kody to demo Teams in Retrospective.


-New MIV tests in phoenix  - phoenix template - https://hsdes.intel.com/resource/16013366709 

"open"

~Core wake on PECI - Test that PECI MSR reads can wake sleeping cores
Enable C-states on SUT: 
 sv.socket0.uncore.punit.dfx_ctrl_unprotected.pkg_cstate_limit = 7
sv.socket0.uncore.punit.dfx_ctrl_unprotected.core_cstate_limit = 5
Configure wake-on-PECI to uncore.  Enter package C6.  
Issue reads to the uncore and ensure that they are forwarded.  
Issue RdIAMSR and RdIAMSREx to cores and ensure that they return 0x82 MAILBOX_PECI_CC_THREAD_UNAVAILABLE  
Issue RdIAMSR to disabled cores and ensure that they are not forwarded.
Configure wake-on-PECI to 2.  Enter package C6
Issue reads to the uncore and ensure that they are forwarded.  
Issue RdIAMSR and RdIAMSREx to cores and ensure that they are forwarded.  
Issue RdIAMSR to disabled cores and ensure that they are not forwarded.


~PCS TMC IB Lock out - Test the PECI Platform Configuration Space Thermal Monitoring Control mailbox lock out bit
Confirm TMC mailbox is writable via PythonSV - import pm.mailboxes as mb; help(mb.bios_mailbox)
Compare and read TMC data via Redfish PECI PCS idx 0x20 param 0x2
Set IB_LOCK bit 30 via same TMC Redfish method
Confirm TMC mailbox is not writable via PythonSV - import pm.mailboxes as mb; help(mb.bios_mailbox)

~BMC MCTP discovery - Confirm that BMC can discover and list add-in cards via MCTP over PCIe
Install MCTP compatible PCIe card into platform
Review BMC journal logs for MCTP discovery of said card /redfish/v1/Managers/bmc/LogServices/Journal/Entries
Check that device is in /redfish/v1/Systems/system/PCIeDevices

Hey Jason,

You can use the following in pythonSV. 

>>> import pm.mailboxes as mb
>>> help(mb.bios_mailbox)
Help on function bios_mailbox in module pm.mailboxes:

bios_mailbox(sktNum, command, addr, data=None)
    BIOS 2 PCode mailbox function
    sktNum  - socket number
    command - MAILBOX_BIOS_CMD_*
    addr    - Address associated with the command
            - for PCS commands it is param[20:8], index[7:0]
    data    - data
    returns (command, data) which include error codes

Best Regards,

Shreyas
